description: A command-line utility for building static pages from YAML configurations using the @gravity-ui/page-constructor package.
how_to_use: Install the package, add `page-builder build` as a build script in package.json, create a `page-builder.config.yml` specifying input/output/assets/theme options, and define pages as YAML files with `meta` and `blocks` sections. Run `npm run build` to generate static HTML files.
readme:
# Page Constructor Builder

A powerful command-line utility for building static pages from YAML configurations using the [@gravity-ui/page-constructor](https://github.com/gravity-ui/page-constructor) package. See [page-constructor storybook](https://preview.gravity-ui.com/page-constructor/) for configuration details.

## Quick Start

1. **Install package:**

```bash
npm install @gravity-ui/page-constructor-builder
```
